subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Kimiya 1
subcodes.first_line: And now as regards that which you hast asked about the Stone: Know that it exists in every locality. In it We decreed treasures which none hath fathomed
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اما ما سئلت من الحجر فاعلم بأنه مطروح فی کل مکان و فیه قدرنا کنوزاً ما اطلع بها الا من علمناه
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @soul; spirit after death, @free will and predestination; fate, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @prayer for forgiveness
